response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority far exceeds the junior/mid-level role, and his resume suggests overqualification and potential misalignment with the high on-site requirement in Germany given his remote-friendly projects and lack of explicit German proficiency.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from frontend to infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS)
Strong architectural mindset and open-source contributions demonstrating initiative
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior-level experience for an entry-level role
Limited evidence of German language proficiency despite high on-site requirement
Extensive history of remote/async work and founder roles may not suit team-dependent environment
